instructions.title: How to Use the Learning Platform
instructions.description: A short welcome video explaining how to navigate the course pages and download files.

instructions.title: Course Folder on Google Drive
instructions.description: Open the shared Google Drive folder for additional videos and supporting resources.

instructions.title: Student Guide
instructions.description: Download the beginner guide for using video lessons, lecture PDFs, and practical tasks.

lectures.title: Lecture 1: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence
lectures.description: Core ideas, history, applications, and the difference between narrow AI and general AI.

lectures.title: Lecture 2: Machine Learning Basics
lectures.description: Supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning with beginner-friendly examples.

practicals.title: Practical 1: Python Notebook for AI Basics
practicals.description: A starter Jupyter Notebook for simple data exploration and model thinking.

practicals.title: Practical 2: AI Ethics Worksheet
practicals.description: A PDF worksheet for discussing fairness, privacy, safety, and responsible AI.

practicals.title: Example GitHub Repository
practicals.description: Open a sample repository that can hold notebooks, datasets, and completed tasks.
